fields.summary: Automate Shopify Network Order Release Process

content.text: Yesterday, after meeting with Justin Scott and having the Signifyd integration fully automated, he confirmed that Michael Moffo can move off the manual process of releasing these orders one by one in SF. My understanding is that SF needs to be reconfigured to auto populate “Orders” from Shopify Network to match the auto populate settings already in place for DTC(Main) Shopify storefront.
So excited to get off this process, thanks for your help HD team!!

There should be a flow? that fulfills orders from shopify.   The affiliate branch was turned off somewhere.  Supplement orders are being created automatically when the opportunity is created.   Check opps and orders.   Order associated with an opportunity.  Supplement order.  Check behind the generate supp order.

updateAuthor.displayName: Capybara: GitHub, Linear, Azure DevOps for Jira & JSM

content.text: This request was escalated to the Engineering team, as it requires flow changes and testing by our QA team. I’ve asked them to provide an update on this.

updateAuthor.displayName: Capybara: GitHub, Linear, Azure DevOps for Jira & JSM

content.text: Hey Team, any update on this ticket by chance?

I’ve asked the Product team to give me an update on this, as this was escalated to them quite a while ago. I see that they have a note that they need more information about this, but that’s all I’ve got so far. I’ll let you know as soon as I get a response back. I’ll also ask them if they want my team to investigate and document the steps their team would need to take to implement this. Unfortunately the Help Desk is not permitted to make configuration changes like this to our Salesforce environment, it has to be the engineering team.
Have questions? Visit our FAQ page.

answers.answer:
Good morning!
Yesterday, after meeting with Justin Scott and having the Signifyd integration fully automated, he confirmed that Michael Moffo can move off the manual process of releasing these orders one by one in SF. My understanding is that SF needs to be reconfigured to auto populate “Orders” from Shopify Network to match the auto populate settings already in place for DTC(Main) Shopify storefront. 
So excited to get off this process, thanks for your help HD team!!
